hero.title: Maître Mahi Fares
hero.subtitle: Advocate accredited to the Court of Boufarik and the Court of Blida. Accredited to the Supreme Court and Council of State
hero.description: Reliable legal expertise at your service for all your legal matters, with total commitment to rigor and professionalism.

about.title: About Us
about.content: Maître Mahi Fares is a professional lawyer providing comprehensive legal services in Boufarik and its surroundings, specializing in legal defense and consultancy.
about.subtitle: Who is the Lawyer?

services.title: Legal Services
services.subtitle: Our Fields
services.description: We offer a wide range of legal services with high professionalism and extreme rigor.
services.item_description: We provide defense advice and complete legal representation to guarantee your rights.

coverage.title: Service Area
coverage.content: We offer our services in Boufarik and nearby regions.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We are here to answer all your legal inquiries. Feel free to contact us to book an appointment or for a consultation.
